llm_eval.notes: Goodhart/自己採点罠予防/Phase0-4/閉ループ/3層メタモデルが内部整合し完全性高い。実装裏取り: meta-harness-observables.json・meta-harness-log-schema-v1.0.json・extract-session-events.py・emit-observable.py(.claude/logs/meta-harness.jsonl append, safety_valve_fired 判定実装済) 全て実在し本章記述と一致。skill-governance-config/-automation plugin も実在。減点: aggregate-evals.py を plugins/skill-governance-automation/scripts/ と記すが実体は plugins/harness-creator/skills/run-skill-rubric-governance/scripts/=パス誤り、auto-record-lesson/lint-composition 等 Phase3項目は未実装(章内で未実装明記のため許容)。
